Vendored dependencies (pinned, compiled statically into bin/lumen):

luasocket  3.1.0       https://github.com/lunarmodules/luasocket  (tag v3.1.0)
  -> vendor/luasocket/  (Linux usocket backend; 13 C files forming socket.core)
lua-cjson  2.1.0.10    https://github.com/openresty/lua-cjson     (tag 2.1.0.10)
  -> vendor/lua-cjson/  (lua_cjson.c + strbuf.c + fpconv.c; system strtod/snprintf,
     so dtoa.c/g_fmt.c are NOT needed)

The raw upstream tarballs/extracted trees live under vendor/_src/ which is
gitignored; only the curated source files above are committed.

luafilesystem 1.8.0  https://github.com/lunarmodules/luafilesystem  (tag v1_8_0)
  -> vendor/luafilesystem/  (lfs.c + lfs.h; provides require("lfs"))
